texto: Do you ever got this feeling of being too small?That kind of size that can make you almost disappear.And everything around is so big, giant… that you don’t even get overwhelmed, because you are too small to even see it.Like the whole universe, is so big that we can’t even imagine how small we really are.Yes, exactly, that kind of size, or even smaller…That is the size I wanna feel right now.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Maia Maranghello: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “Do you ever got this feeling of being too small?That kind of size that can make you almost disapp…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, big, feelings pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de feelings e giants.
